history.summary: Manual run — Vlad sharpened the focus: ecommerce CPS/CPA only, Pop/Popunder only, and check ISP/iCloud targeting on every TS. After feedback on prior week (Levanta dropped — it's an Amazon-influencer SaaS, not a network; AvantLink → Spirion; LinkConnector → Spread; GiddyUp → Galatea; Soicos → Spirion; PopAds, TrafficShop, EZmob registered; PopMyAds testing). 9 searches run. 3 new ANs that pass the ecommerce CPS/CPA filter and 2 new TSs with confirmed ISP-level targeting.

affiliate_networks.name: Tracdelight
affiliate_networks.description: Germany's largest fashion/beauty/lifestyle performance network. 2,000+ premium publishers and bloggers, shoppable-content widgets connecting publishers directly to retailer SKUs. Strict premium-publisher curation = clean inventory. Pure ecommerce play.

affiliate_networks.name: Perform[cb]
affiliate_networks.description: Voted #1 in Outcomes worldwide 7 years running by mThink. AI media-buying platform that auto-matches traffic to highest-EPC ecommerce campaigns. Reports a 36% EPC lift for affiliates. Weekly payouts, $50 min, ACH/PayPal/wire.
affiliate_networks.vertical: Ecommerce + LeadGen (we'd use ecom side only)

affiliate_networks.name: AdJuice Network
affiliate_networks.description: 12+ years operating in lead-gen / ecommerce / affiliate marketing. Distributes leads to 350+ retail clients across 7 verticals. Ecommerce-focused buyer base, experienced AM team.
affiliate_networks.suggested_company: Omnia or Impulsprom (empty rosters — good entry point)

traffic_sources.name: Reacheffect
traffic_sources.description: Pop/Push/Banner/Native, 2B+ clicks/month, 200+ countries (top: US, MX, CN, JP, FR, IT). Operating since 2012. Strong AM support, fast approvals.
traffic_sources.isp_targeting: YES — full ISP filtering + IP filtering + States + Cities + carrier
traffic_sources.icloud_targeting: Not advertised explicitly, but full Apple/iOS device + carrier filtering supported
traffic_sources.fit_note: Tier-1 volume + ISP filter = exactly what Vlad asked for

traffic_sources.name: FatAds
traffic_sources.description: Newer pop+push network built by media-buying professionals. AI-driven bid optimization. Smaller scale than the giants but cleaner traffic, designed for experienced affiliates.
traffic_sources.isp_targeting: YES — country, region, city, device, OS, browser, browser language, ISP, and carrier
traffic_sources.icloud_targeting: Not explicitly listed; carrier targeting available
traffic_sources.fit_note: Pop format + ISP targeting confirmed; positioned as 'high quality optimized' not cheap volume

networks: Mobidea (already in last week's discoveries — and mobile/non-ecom heavy)
AdCombo (already in last week's discoveries — nutra-heavy, doesn't fit ecom-only filter)
Tradedoubler / Rakuten / Awin / FlexOffers / Impact / CJ (already across rosters)
TerraLeads / Zeydoo (filter fail — nutra/sweepstakes, not pure ecom)
traffic_sources: PropellerAds, RichAds, AdMaven, Clickadu, Adsterra, PopCash, ClickAdu, HilltopAds, Galaksion, AdCash (already in roster)
ROIads, EvaDav, OnClickA, TwinRed, Mondiad, Taboola, Zeropark, TrafficStars (already in last week's discoveries)

feedback_from_last_week.Levanta: Dropped — it's a creator/Amazon-influencer SaaS platform, not a network. Tommy will not surface it again.
feedback_from_last_week.PopMyAds: Testing — same parent as PopCash, may overlap
feedback_from_last_week.EZmob: Already registered — Vlad to verify activity

history.summary: Second run today — searched CPA networks, cashback platforms (EU/APAC), Nordic/LATAM GEOs, push/pop/native traffic sources via RichAds/ROIads roundups, AffLIFT, and Affpaying. Strongest new AN find: Zeydoo (sweepstakes/utilities, 200+ GEOs, 2.5M daily conversions) and ShopBack (APAC cashback giant, $350M raised). Strongest new TS find: Zeropark (pop/domain redirect/commerce media). Run 1 (07:30 UTC) added 5 AN + 6 TS; Run 2 (this run) adds 6 AN + 2 TS.
history.note: Full details preserved in git history (commit prior to 2026-05-04).
